meta_description: Same-day private GP appointments in Fulwood, Preston. See Dr Faizal Secretary today — from £49. NHS records accessed. No referral needed.
pricing_intro_1: Know exactly what you're paying before you book. No registration fee, no hidden extras.
pricing_intro_2: Prescription writing and referral letters are included in every appointment. If medication is prescribed, you take it to any UK pharmacy and pay the standard dispensing cost there — the same as an NHS prescription. Blood tests and scans are quoted separately if needed.
hero_next_avail: Next Available: Friday 10th April — Book Online, Call, or WhatsApp
services_intro: From everyday illness to specialist referrals — all under one roof, without the wait.

why_cards.title: Same Day
why_cards.text: Call us in the morning, see a doctor today. In-person at the clinic, by telephone, or at your home — whichever suits you.

why_cards.title: The Same Doctor, Every Time
why_cards.text: You'll always see Dr Faizal Secretary — not whoever happens to be free. He knows your history, your concerns, and your name.

why_cards.title: You Choose the Length
why_cards.text: 15 minutes for a quick follow-up, up to an hour if you need it. No rushing, no clock-watching — your appointment, your pace.

why_cards.title: Your NHS Records, In the Room
why_cards.text: With your consent, Dr Secretary can access your NHS records during your appointment. No repeating your history. No starting from scratch.

hero_sub_1: 15 minutes to an hour with **the same doctor, every time.**
hero_sub_2: Same-day access. Your NHS records in the room. From £49.

pricing_rows.label: Adult
pricing_rows.note: 60-minute consultation — health checks, complex or multiple concerns

how_heading: See a Doctor in Three Simple Steps
why_intro: The average NHS GP appointment is 10 minutes. The average wait for one is 3 weeks. There's a better way.
doctor_role: Founder & Lead GP, My Private Clinic

how_steps.title: Book
how_steps.text: Call us or send a WhatsApp. We're open every Friday 9am–8pm, with all other days available by appointment. We'll find a time that works.

how_steps.title: Be Seen
how_steps.text: Come to our clinic at Fatima Health Centre in Fulwood, join by phone or video, or we can come to you. You get the time you need.

how_steps.title: Leave With a Plan
how_steps.text: Prescription writing and referral letters included if needed — sorted before you leave. The doctor follows up personally on any outstanding results.

doctor_quote_cite: — Dr Faizal Secretary, MBChB, University of Manchester
doctor_bio_1: Dr Secretary trained at the University of Manchester and spent years working within the NHS across general practice and acute medicine. He founded My Private Clinic to offer something straightforward: longer appointments, the same doctor every time, and space to actually talk.

reviews.text: "I'd been putting off a conversation about my blood pressure for months. Dr Secretary gave me 30 minutes and went through everything properly. I left with my prescription and a referral already sorted."
reviews.author: Sarah M. — Fulwood · February 2026

reviews.text: "My son had a high temperature on a Saturday morning. We were seen the same day. The doctor was calm, thorough, and explained everything clearly. At £49, absolutely worth it for the peace of mind alone."
reviews.author: James T. — Preston · January 2026

reviews.text: "The doctor didn't make me feel stupid for leaving things. He was straightforward, ran some bloods, and when I needed referring on, the letter was ready before I left the room. No extra charge."
reviews.author: David R. — Longridge · March 2026

doctor_bio_2: Every patient at My Private Clinic is seen by Dr Secretary directly. No locums, no rotation. The same doctor who sees you today will know your history next time.
cta_text: Same-day appointments, every Friday. Other days by appointment. Call or WhatsApp 07424 172034.
doctor_quote: Good medicine takes time. That's what we're here to give you.
hero_nhs_note: We work **alongside your NHS GP** — not instead of them.

services.name: GP Consultations
services.desc: Same-day appointments in person, by phone or video. 15, 30 or 60-minute slots available. No NHS referral needed to book.

services.name: Women's Health
services.desc: Smear tests, HRT, menopause, contraception, UTIs, PCOS and fertility concerns — handled with care and complete confidentiality.

services.name: Men's Health
services.desc: Prostate checks, testosterone, erectile dysfunction, cardiovascular screening and male menopause — conversations worth having.

services.name: Children's Health
services.desc: Same-day appointments for children of all ages, from infants to teenagers. No child should wait weeks to be seen.

services.name: Blood Tests & Health Screening
services.desc: Comprehensive panels, Well Man and Well Woman checks. Results explained personally by the doctor — not just emailed over.

services.name: Allergy Testing
services.desc: Targeted IgE blood testing for food and environmental allergens. Results interpreted personally by the doctor.

services.name: Weight Loss Management
services.desc: Medical assessment, clinical support and prescription weight loss medication. Wegovy and Mounjaro available.

services.name: Sexual Health Screening
services.desc: Confidential STI testing and treatment. Results never shared without your consent. No judgement. No fuss.

services.name: Travel Health & Vaccinations
services.desc: Pre-travel consultations and country-specific vaccinations. Coming soon — register your interest today.

services.name: Joint Injections
services.desc: Corticosteroid injections for knee, shoulder, hip, elbow, ankle and wrist. Fast-acting relief — launching soon.

services.name: Minor Surgery
services.desc: Mole removal, cyst removal, lipoma removal, skin tag removal and ingrown toenail treatment. No NHS waiting list.

services.name: IV Drips
services.desc: Seven intravenous vitamin and hydration formulas, administered personally by the doctor. Launching soon.

services.name: Sick Notes & Medical Reports
services.desc: Same-day fit notes, employer letters, insurance reports, DVLA medicals and visa medicals — issued promptly.

services.name: Home Visits
services.desc: Can't come to us? We'll come to you. Available across Fulwood and central Preston by appointment.

meta_title: Private GP in Fulwood, Preston | My Private Clinic
